title: Senior Fleet Manager at Flipkart Logistics

jsonLd.title: Senior Fleet Manager at Flipkart Logistics
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Flipkart Logistics! We are hiring a Fleet Manager for our Indore team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Flipkart Logistics:
Flipkart Logistics is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in Reverse Logistics
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in Cold Chain Logistics
• Proficiency in ERP Systems

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Professional development and training programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Life and accident insurance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Flipkart Logistics!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
